## Summary

Describe the change in framework terms.

## Story

- PRD story id:

## Checks

- [ ] The change is the smallest correct change.
- [ ] Layer boundaries remain clear.
- [ ] APIs stayed finite or got narrower.
- [ ] Required states were covered or documented.
- [ ] Accessibility impact was reviewed.
- [ ] Docs and exported context were updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] `progress.txt` was appended when required.
- [ ] Verification commands were run.

## Verification

List exact commands and outcomes.

## Risks

List any remaining doctrinal, runtime, or release risks.
